category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Mali.

title.en: China-to-Mali EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入马里：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入馬里：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Mali AMANORM / CREE / EDM-SA requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations (Francophone IEC alignment), EDM-SA grid-connection and project-approval requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Contextualised honestly: Mali's EV market is extremely nascent, electricity deficits and low electrification heavily constrain deployment, and 2/3-wheelers dominate over passenger cars.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与马里AMANORM / CREE / EDM-SA要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期（法语区IEC技术路线）、EDM-SA并网及项目审批要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。诚实呈现背景：马里电动汽车市场极为初级，严重的电力短缺和极低的通电率极大限制了充电部署；两/三轮电动车比乘用车更具市场相关性。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與馬里AMANORM / CREE / EDM-SA要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期（法語區IEC技術路線）、EDM-SA併網及項目審批要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。誠實呈現背景：馬里電動汽車市場極為初級，嚴重的電力短缺和極低的通電率極大限制了充電部署；兩/三輪電動車比乘用車更具市場相關性。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Mali, the confirmed practical gaps are: (1) connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC), as Mali's Francophone IEC alignment means GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with any IEC 62196 vehicle inlet; (2) IEC 61851-1 safety evidence and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, required by AMANORM-aligned technical specifications and any EDM-SA or donor-funded project; (3) EDM-SA grid coordination for grid-connected installations — Mali operates 220/380 V, 50 Hz, but suffers chronic load shedding and supply instability that affects charger design and derating requirements; (4) EMC evidence per IEC 61000 series; (5) high-temperature and dust ingress protection (IP65 recommended for outdoor equipment in Mali's Sahelian climate); (6) AMANORM conformity assessment, coordinated through CREE; (7) French-language documentation throughout. Critically, exporters must understand that Mali's EV passenger-car market is extremely nascent, grid electrification is below 50% nationally (well below in rural areas), and 2/3-wheel electric vehicles are far more commercially relevant than four-wheel EV chargers. Feasibility is driven primarily by NGO, UNDP, or development-bank-funded pilot projects rather than commercial retail channels.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入马里时，已确认的实务差距包括：(1) 接口须从GB/T 20234硬件重新设计为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）——马里采用法语区IEC技术路线，GB/T接口与IEC 62196车辆接口在物理上不兼容；(2) 须提供IEC 61851-1安全证据，直流充电站须提供IEC 61851-23证据，这是AMANORM标准规范及EDM-SA或捐助方资助项目的要求；(3) 并网安装须与EDM-SA协调——马里电网为220/380 V、50 Hz，但长期面临计划停电和供电不稳定，影响充电桩设计和降额要求；(4) 须提供IEC 61000系列EMC证据；(5) 须满足高温和防尘防护要求（马里萨赫勒气候下室外设备推荐IP65）；(6) 须通过CREE协调的AMANORM合格评定；(7) 全部文件须采用法语。尤为重要的是，出口商须了解马里乘用车电动汽车市场极为初级，全国通电率低于50%（农村地区更低），两/三轮电动车的商业相关性远高于四轮电动汽车充电桩。市场可行性主要依赖非政府组织、联合国开发计划署或开发性银行资助的试点项目，而非商业零售渠道。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入馬里時，已確認的實務差距包括：(1) 接口須從GB/T 20234硬體重新設計為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）——馬里採用法語區IEC技術路線，GB/T接口與IEC 62196車輛接口在物理上不兼容；(2) 須提供IEC 61851-1安全證據，直流充電站須提供IEC 61851-23證據，這是AMANORM標準規範及EDM-SA或捐助方資助項目的要求；(3) 併網安裝須與EDM-SA協調——馬里電網為220/380 V、50 Hz，但長期面臨計劃停電和供電不穩定，影響充電樁設計和降額要求；(4) 須提供IEC 61000系列EMC證據；(5) 須滿足高溫和防塵防護要求（馬里薩赫勒氣候下室外設備推薦IP65）；(6) 須通過CREE協調的AMANORM合格評定；(7) 全部文件須採用法語。尤為重要的是，出口商須了解馬里乘用車電動汽車市場極為初級，全國通電率低於50%（農村地區更低），兩/三輪電動車的商業相關性遠高於四輪電動汽車充電樁。市場可行性主要依賴非政府組織、聯合國開發計劃署或開發性銀行資助的試點項目，而非商業零售渠道。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, AMANORM or CREE scope determination, EDM-SA approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, and installers should verify current Mali conformity assessment rules, EDM-SA grid-connection requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Mali's regulatory and grid infrastructure is evolving; information should be confirmed directly with AMANORM, CREE, and EDM-SA.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、AMANORM或CREE适用范围裁定、EDM-SA批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行马里合格评定规则、EDM-SA并网要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。马里的监管和电网基础设施仍在演变中，相关信息应直接向AMANORM、CREE和EDM-SA确认。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、AMANORM或CREE適用範圍裁定、EDM-SA批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬里合格評定規則、EDM-SA併網要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。馬里的監管和電網基礎設施仍在演變中，相關信息應直接向AMANORM、CREE和EDM-SA確認。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
